title: v92 — BSOD Fix #2
description: Fixed SYSTEM_SERVICE_EXCEPTION crash on spoof. Disabled WMI hook which was running at wrong IRQL. Registry-level spoof still fully covers everything EAC reads.

title: v91 — Spoof State Fix
description: Fixed app incorrectly showing 'already spoofed' after a reboot. Now correctly checks if the kernel driver is still loaded before restoring spoof state.

title: v90 — Remember Spoof State
description: App now remembers you are spoofed across restarts. Reopen the app after spoofing and it will show the before/after serials automatically without needing to spoof again.

title: v89 — Stability & UX
description: Fixed BSOD crash on second spoof. After spoofing, app auto-switches to Serials tab showing before/after values, then closes in 20 seconds.

title: v88 — MAC Spoof Removed
description: Removed MAC address spoofing which caused WAN Miniport Code 31 errors and WiFi disconnects on reboot. NIC ContainerID still spoofed. No more driver damage after restart.

title: v82 — License Backend Switch
description: Replaced Supabase license backend with Filemonk API. Keys from novasoftware.store now validate correctly. Dev keys still work offline.
